---
title: "리스팅 위치, 다중 리스팅, YAML 리스팅"
categories: [웹사이트, 리스팅, 위치, 다중리스팅]
---

### 리스팅 위치

`id` 블록 사용하여 위치 지정

```yml
---
title: "Listing Example"
listing:
  id: sample-listings
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
---

You can review the following documents for additional information:

::: {#sample-listings}
:::

Learn more about Quarto
```

### 다중 리스팅

```yml
---
title: Team Documents
listing: 
  - id: lab-reports
    contents: "lab-reports/*.qmd"
    type: table
  - id: meeting-notes
    contents: "meeting-notes/*.qmd"
    type: table
---

## Lab Reports

::: {#lab-reports}
:::

## Meeting Notes

::: {#meeting-notes}
:::
```

### YAML 리스팅

```yml
---
title: "Listing Example"
listing:
  id: sample-listings
  contents: 
    - posts
    - archived-items.yaml
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
---
```

```yml
# archived-items.yml
- title: "Archived Item 1"
  author: Norah Jones
  date: 2020-01-01
  path: "archived/archived-item-.html"
  categories: [archived, technology]
```
